deviations.what: the ObjectStatus state values Indication06-Indication08 (since UI5 1.75) and Indication09-Indication20 (since UI5 1.120) are newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.120 to render them all (>= 1.75 for Indication06-Indication08).

the active status press opens the controller-built Dialog 1:1 (core:FragmentDefinition + popup_display, per CAPABILITIES.md): a Dialog with a VBox, a Text and an OK Button - these popup controls are extra to the view XML. Confirm the popup opens and closes in a running system.
